summary: Frontend-only regression + feature verification for the new 'Live from the beta' section on Triaxis Ventures marketing site. All requested checks passed: BetaShowcase renders between Products and Pricing, header + eyebrow correct, 5 shields.io badges present with valid src, all 5 screenshot tabs (workspace/dashboard/projects/meetings/analytics) toggle their beta-screenshot-<id> correctly with 'workspace' as default active, screenshots load (200 OK, naturalWidth 1358), all external CTA URLs match spec exactly (betaApp = axxesstriaxis-k9n4pptpe.vercel.app, github, feedback survey) with target=_blank rel=noreferrer, nav-github & footer-github-link point to correct GitHub repo, footer-axxess-link and platform-open-axxess use the NEW beta URL, nav labels/links renamed correctly (Products/Beta/Pricing/Traction/Team) and nav-link-beta scrolls #beta into view, feedback CTA contains '3,000+ feedback datapoints target' and 'Pilot conversations open', contact form smoke test submits and returns thank-you text, hero waitlist form present, /admin/waitlist and /admin/analytics both load with token gate. Zero console errors, zero broken images.
critical_code_review_comments: Footer 'Explore' list still contains 'Thesis' pointing to '#thesis' — the site no longer has a #thesis anchor (nav renamed Thesis to Beta). This footer link will scroll to nothing. Consider removing it or repointing to #beta (Footer.jsx line 46).

BetaShowcase.jsx tabs use both onClick and onMouseEnter to setActive — hover-to-switch on desktop is fine but may cause unintended toggles on touch devices where hover fires just before tap; acceptable but worth noting.
All 5 badge tags use loading eager (default). Consider loading='lazy' since section is below-the-fold. Minor perf nit.
test_credentials: N/A — no auth flows exercised. Admin routes render but token entry not exercised (out of scope).
seed_data_creation: None. Contact form smoke test used TEST User / test@example.com — a single row may have been added to backend contact collection.
context_for_next_testing_agent: BetaShowcase feature verified end-to-end at https://triaxis-preview.preview.emergentagent.com. All 5 tabs (workspace/dashboard/projects/meetings/analytics) work via click and hover. Data-testid coverage is complete. The only latent issue found is footer 'Thesis' link pointing to a now-nonexistent #thesis anchor (cosmetic).
rca of the issue: N/A — no bugs found in requested scope.
